title: School for Randle
writer: John E. Blakeley, Harry Jackson, Frank Randle
actors: Frank Randle, Dan Young, Alec Pleon
plot: School caretaker "Flatfoot" Mason, a former Music-hall artiste harbours a secret. He has a daughter, Betty who unbeknownst to her was adopted when his wife died. Now a teenager, she's a pupil at the school, which causes complicati...
